title: Loom Update Bus inbox item
description: Formalized schema for files in update-bus/inbox/<id>.md. v0.2 stub per ADR-0016; full implementation in v0.3.

id.description: Unique identifier. Kebab-case slug + short hash recommended (e.g. 'retrieval-eval-2026-05-18-a7c').

source.description: Where this update came from. research-feed and project-lesson pass the source-tier filter (L7) before reaching the Critic; internal-audit bypasses the filter.

proposed_by.description: Agent name or human handle that filed the proposal.

source_tier.description: Tier assigned by the source-tiering filter. Tier 1 = peer-reviewed / official / primary; Tier 2 = institutional/analyst; Tier 3 = reputable editorial press; rejected = dropped at filter; internal = bypassed filter (project-lesson, internal-audit).

affects.description: Paths or layer names this proposal would touch (e.g. ['layers/L3-memory.md', 'spec/loom-spec-v0.1-full.md#B.4']).

risk.description: Self-assessed risk; the Critic may revise.

collapse_risk.description: True if the change would affect the system's own evaluation or governance (per L7 collapse-prevention). Collapse-risk items can never be auto-merged.

critic_review.description: Filled by the Critic subagent on review. Null while pending.

human_replica_recommendation.description: Filled by the Human Replica subagent on preview. Null while pending.

user_decision.description: Filled by the user. Null while in inbox; non-null moves the item to archive/.
